top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Burnham set to take helm of 'poverty stricken disaster,' says Trump
top_signals.summary: Britain's new Prime Minister Andy Burnham faces instant pressure from President Trump to "open up" North Sea oil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: South Korea Details Plan to Make Won Freely Tradable Abroad
top_signals.summary: South Korea laid out a detailed plan to make the won freely tradable among foreigners, its boldest step yet to liberalize the foreign-exchange market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tiny ecosystem with several organisms found in bottle cap off Kochi
top_signals.summary: The discovery shows that a large amount of plastic waste floating in the sea can become small ships of organisms, according to Japanese researchers.
